india_trends.title: Small-cap stock under ₹50 Aayush Wellness jumps 9% despite bloodbath on Dalal Street
india_trends.summary: Aayush Wellness shares rose 9% to ₹39, hitting a three-month high, with a cumulative gain of 21% over two days. The company launched Liver Care Tablets to address liver health concerns, aiming to capture growth in the nutraceutical market, projected at $18 billion.

india_trends.title: Govt misses FY26 highway construction target due to delay in land acquisition
india_trends.summary: National highway construction in the last fiscal year reached 9,380 km, falling short of the 10,000 km target. This marks the slowest pace since 2017-18. india_trends.title: IndusInd Bank Q4 Results: Profit at ₹594 crore vs loss YoY; NII jumps 43%, asset quality improves
india_trends.summary: IndusInd Bank reported a net profit of ₹594.2 crore for FY26, reversing last year's loss of ₹2,329 crore. The bank's net interest income rose 43.4% year-on-year to ₹4,372 crore, surpassing analysts' expectations.

india_trends.title: IndusInd Bank Q4 Results: Lender reports profit of Rs 533 cr vs loss year ago; declares Rs 1.5/share final dividend
india_trends.summary: IndusInd Bank Q4 Results: IndusInd Bank has announced a significant turnaround, posting a standalone net profit of Rs 533 crore in the fourth quarter, a stark contrast to the Rs 2,236 crore loss a year ago. Despite a sequential dip in profit, the bank declared a final dividend of Rs 1.

india_trends.title: India, US agree to stay engaged on trade pact after latest round of talks
india_trends.summary: In a collaborative effort, Indian and US officials finalized a series of trade talks on April 23, marking a pivotal moment in their economic relationship. They have pledged to persist with their discussions, focusing on critical elements such as market access and the growing field of digital trade.
